# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties for Apache Kafka

# Basic configuration
broker.id=0  # Unique identifier for this broker in the cluster
num.network.threads=3
num.io.threads=8
background.threads=2
queue.buffering.max.messages=10000
queue.buffering.max.ms=500
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

# Log configuration
log.dirs=/path/to/kafka-logs  # Path to store Kafka logs
num.partitions=3
log.retention.hours=168
log.segment.bytes=1073741824
log.cleanup.policy=delete
zookeeper.connect=localhost:2181/kafka  # Zookeeper connection string

# Replication configuration
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2

# Listener configuration
listeners=PLAINTEXT://your_kafka_broker_address:9092
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your_advertised_kafka_broker_address:9092

# SSL/TLS Configuration (optional)
ssl.keystore.location=/path/to/keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=changeit
ssl.key.password=changeit
ssl.truststore.location=/path/to/truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=changeit
security.inter.broker.protocol=SSL
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=GSSAPI

# Security and authentication (optional)
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.auth.SimpleAclAuthorizer
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false
